choose_language: 🇺🇿 Tilni tanlang / 🇷🇺 Выберите язык / 🇬🇧 Choose language
main_menu:
Welcome, {name}! 👋

What would you like to do?
no_shops:
😔 No barbershops registered in this region yet.

Check back soon!
today_no_shop: ❌ No shop found. Please register first.
remind_confirmed: 👍 You confirmed your visit. See you there!
remind_cancelled_customer: Booking cancelled. See you next time! ✌️
help_text: ℹ️ How to use this bot: 👤 For customers: 1. Tap «💈 Find a barber» 2. Pick your region 3. Choose a barbershop 4. Tap «📅 Book now» 5. Select a date and time, enter your name and phone 6. You'll get a Telegram notification when the barber confirms ✂️ For barbers: 1. Tap «🏪 Register my barbershop» 2. Register your barbershop 3. Set your working hours and weekly schedule 4. You'll get automatic notifications for new bookings 5. /bugun — see today's bookings list 🔄 To restart at any time, tap «🔄 Restart».
